raw.subject: Your Cedar Rapids page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about booking weekend appointments caught my attention - I'm sure many customers are eager to plan ahead.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you online.

I sketched a page idea that could help showcase your menu, hours, and photos - a menu hero section, an hours block, and a photo gallery.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/stay-sharp-barbershop-cedar-rapids

I'd love to discuss how a simple website can help you reach more customers - my flat fee for local businesses makes it affordable to get started. Let me know if you're interested in a quick call to chat about it.
